chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S-477 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA-8178/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 08.12.2025. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy Prosecutor General. = None present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. This being the case since the matter was instituted none has appeared on behalf of the applicant. It appears that applicant has lost interest in this matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Shahid
